title: Cliselda Clear Acrylic Display Boxes, 5 Sided Cube (3 pcs), Display Case Plastic Box Perspex Stand, Dustproof Protection Showcase for Action Figures, Toys, Collectibles
features: 【Acrylic Box without Lid】 The lidless design gives these boxes a unique nesting and stackable feature. A 3-inch cube fits into a 4-inch cube and a 4-inch cube fits into a 5-inch cube.When not using these boxes, the nesting feature will greatly help you save space.
【Perfect Size Acrylic Decoration Boxes】Large Size- 6"x 6"x 6", Medium Size- 5"x 5"x 5", Small Size- 4"x 4"x 4". You will get 3 Pieces clear boxes.

【Acrylic Boxes for Display】When the lidless bottom flips down, it makes a perfect display box to display your collectibles, crafts, jewelry etc. These acrylic display cubes are also great for parties or weddings to hold cakes, candies, party favors and more.

【Acrylic Boxes for Storage】When the lidless bottom flips up, it makes a perfect organizer storage box to be used on a dresser to organize your makeup or nail polish ,etc. It can also be placed on your office desktop, bathroom, bedroom to store small everyday items.

【Durable and Strong】Cliselda acrylic display risers made of crystal super clear Acrylic, high transparency, chemical stability and weather-ability. It is stronger and more durable than plastic boxes, looks better, and is non-toxic and non-polluting.5 sides with fine wiring of the joints, polished smooth edges.

The acrylic cube also can add flowers, decorative beads, or rocks to make a creative centerpiece. Perfect for everyday bouquets or large events. Acrylic Boxes for Storage Flip it over and each box becomes a square transparent base.It can be used to store some small daily items. Such as putting it on the dresser to keep your makeup organized.It also can be placed on the home or office desktop to store small stationery items such as scissors, calculators and erasers. Sizes Large riser size: 12.7*12.7*12.7 CM Medium riser size: 10.2*10.2*10.2 CM Small riser size: 7.6*7.6*7.6 CM You will Get 3 PCS! Design This acrylic box has both display and storage functions. It can be used not only to display your favorite collections, but also to store small items. Multifunctional 5 Sided Acrylic Boxes Multifunctional 5 Sided Acrylic Boxes It has both display and storage functions Excellent transparency Stable and durable Superior impact resistance Crack resistance Specification Material：High Transparency Acrylic Package: Wrapped in protective layers Feature: Fully assembled case Different Display Effects Place the collection on top of the box to highlight the display function and make everyone's focus on the collection. It makes your treasured collectibles go from plain on the shelf to being highlighted beautifully. Putting the collection inside the box to highlight the function of protection. These display boxes to keep the collection dust-free, reduce sunlight and ultraviolet radiation.
